title: Define manufacturing, provisioning, calibration, and test service contracts
summary: Ensure board packages and platform services expose factory-test, identity, key injection, calibration, diagnostics, traceability, repair and decommission operations from the start.

title: Freeze product-hardware architecture envelope
summary: Define target quality, dimensions, display, camera, compute/memory/storage, radios, sensors, battery/runtime, thermal, security, repair, markets, lifecycle and cost ranges without selecting a vendor.

title: Build preliminary product BOM and cost model
summary: Estimate modules/components, NRE, tooling, certification, assembly/test, yield, logistics, warranty, support and volume sensitivity for candidate architectures.

title: Select module-versus-custom subsystem strategy
summary: Choose which early developer-device functions use documented modules versus custom silicon/board integration to control quality, openness, cost and schedule.

title: Design custom carrier-board reference architecture
summary: Create a module-based developer-device architecture connecting compute, memory/storage, display/touch, camera, audio, cellular, Wi-Fi/Bluetooth, sensors, battery/power, debug and security.

title: Define display, enclosure, battery, charging, thermal, and repair architecture
summary: Translate product quality into safe mechanical/electrical/thermal design with serviceability, user protection, regulatory and supply constraints.

title: Define production camera module and calibration architecture
summary: Select sensor/lens/OIS/ISP/module options, physical interfaces, calibration stations/data ownership, tuning/support and replacement strategy.

title: Define production cellular/RF module and antenna architecture
summary: Select module, bands/variants, SIM/eSIM, antennas/coexistence, firmware/support, certification inheritance and test interfaces.
